title: selaginella aculeatifolia
intro: Selaginella aculeatifolia, also known as the spiny-leaved spike moss, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Selaginella, characterized by its spiny leaves and ability to thrive in shaded, humid environments. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds that may help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Selaginella aculeatifolia are believed to include anti-aging effects, improved wound healing, and enhanced immune function, although further research is needed to confirm these claims. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, ointments, or creams, and may be combined with other herbs to create topical treatments for skin conditions and injuries.
